text:
General Return Window:
Customers can request a refund for any physical or standard hardware product within 30 days from the original date of delivery. To be eligible for a return, items must be unused, in their original packaging, and in the same condition as received. Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer unless the product arrived damaged or defective.

Refund Processing Times:
Once a returned item is received and inspected at our warehouse, refund requests take approximately 5 to 7 business days to process. Approved refunds will be issued back to the original payment method used during the transaction. Please note that credit card statement updates may take an additional 3 to 5 business days depending on the customer's financial institution.

Digital Download Exceptions:
All digital products, including software license codes, downloadable content (DLC), and cloud API credits, are strictly non-refundable once the activation key is generated or credits are allocated to the user account. Customers are encouraged to verify compatibility and usage limits prior to purchasing digital downloads.

Subscription Cancellations:
Monthly recurring subscriptions can be cancelled at any time through the customer dashboard under Billing Settings. Cancellations will take effect at the end of the current billing cycle, and no partial refunds will be issued for unused days within the active month. Annual subscriptions cancelled within the first 14 days of purchase are eligible for a prorated refund, minus a $15 administration processing fee.

Shipping Options and Transit Times:
We offer three shipping speeds for domestic orders within the United States:
1. Standard Ground Shipping: Takes 3 to 5 business days for delivery.
2. Express Shipping: Takes 1 to 2 business days.
3. Next-Day Priority Shipping: Delivers by 12:00 PM the following business day if the order is placed before 2:00 PM EST.

Shipping Rates:
Domestic Standard Ground shipping is completely free for all orders totaling $75.00 or more before tax. For orders under $75.00, standard shipping is charged at a flat rate of $5.99. Express shipping carries a flat fee of $14.99, and Next-Day Priority is billed at $29.99 regardless of order value.

International Delivery:
We ship internationally to selected countries in Europe, Canada, and Australia. International shipments are sent via Global Express Carrier and typically take 7 to 14 business days. The flat shipping fee for Canada is $19.99, while shipping to European destinations and Australia carries a flat fee of $34.99.

Customs, Duties, and Taxes:
For all international deliveries, customers are responsible for paying any import duties, customs fees, and local taxes assessed by their country's customs department upon arrival. These fees are not included in the purchase price or shipping rates calculated at checkout, and failure to pay them will result in the package being returned to our sender facility.

Support Tiers Overview:
Our customer support center operates with three primary support tiers:
1. Tier 1 Support (General Help): Handles password resets, account settings, basic navigation help, and standard shipping/billing inquiries. Response target SLA is 2 hours.
2. Tier 2 Support (Technical Specialists): Handles software bug reports, API setup integration issues, and advanced database configurations. Response target SLA is 8 hours.
3. Tier 3 Support (Senior Engineers & Operations): Resolves severe server outages, custom code deployments, and database corruption issues. Response target SLA is 24 hours.

Escalation Path:
Tickets that cannot be resolved at Tier 1 are escalated by the handling representative to Tier 2 within 1 hour of initial contact. If Tier 2 determines that the problem is caused by a core platform defect or system bug, they will escalate it directly to Tier 3 within 2 hours. Customers will receive an automated email notification whenever their ticket's support tier changes.

Emergency Escalations:
Enterprise SLA clients are entitled to immediate Tier 3 emergency escalation for any production system outage or security breach. To trigger an emergency escalation, enterprise customers must select the "Severity 1 Outage" checkbox on the ticket submission form or call the dedicated priority emergency hotline at 1-800-555-0199. Tier 3 engineers will respond within 15 minutes for severity 1 emergencies.

Supervisor Reviews:
If a customer is unsatisfied with the resolution or handling speed of their support request, they may request a formal Supervisor Review. Tier 1 or Tier 2 agents are policy-bound to immediately forward the request to the Support Manager, who will review the ticket history and contact the customer via phone within 4 hours to resolve the dispute.
